items.inspection: EXIF/GPS/SEO metadata applied; ready in redo/
items.prompt: Create one realistic travel image for a Swedish Fuerteventura travel guide. Target filename after download: 5-dagar-pa-fuerteventura-boka-din-resa-fuerteventura.png Recommended size/aspect: 1536x1024 landscape. Expected downloaded file format: PNG. Image brief: A wide, slightly elevated realistic travel photograph showing the neighbourhood context at Boka din resa i Fuerteventura in Fuerteventura, Spain, during the most relevant travel season for the scene. The scene clearly represents boka din resa with realistisk ömiljö, ljusa stränder, vindpinad natur, små orter, människor i rörelse och tydliga reseguide-detaljer. Include natural human activity, realistic parked rental cars or traffic where appropriate, and boats only if the location is near the harbour or coast. Bright Mediterranean daylight, authentic architecture, true-to-life colors, detailed shadows, realistic scale, documentary travel photography style. No readable text, no fake signs, no logos, no watermark. Make it feel like a believable editorial travel photograph, not a glossy ad. Keep architecture, geography, light, people, traffic, and scale realistic for Fuerteventura. Important constraints: - No readable text, no fake signs, no logos, no watermark. - Make it feel like a believable editorial travel photograph, not a glossy ad. - Keep architecture, geography, light, people, traffic, and scale realistic for Fuerteventura. - Do not show distorted faces, extra limbs, strange vehicles, or impossible street layouts.
